# EphemeralPrivateKey

**Associated Type**

The type of the ephemeral private key.

## Declaration

```swift
associatedtype EphemeralPrivateKey : HPKEDiffieHellmanPrivateKeyGeneration where Self == Self.EphemeralPrivateKey.PublicKey
```
